metadata.description: A CSS design-system plugin for Claude Code — write vanilla CSS the 37signals way in any framework, zero build tools. Distilled from Campfire, Writebook, and Fizzy.

plugins.name: dhh-css
plugins.description: 5 skills that make any LLM fluent in 37signals-style vanilla CSS — framework-agnostic, no build tools. Bootstrap a design system from a blank project (css-design-system), then deepen it: OKLCH tokens + dark mode (css-design-tokens), variable-driven semantic components (css-components), modern features like :has() / @starting-style / container queries / color-mix (css-modern-features), and guardrails — anti-patterns, naming, review checklist (css-guardrails).
